footer.x_profile: X (formerly Twitter) profile (opens in new tab)
footer.tagline: Full-stack developer & tech blogger. Building web, mobile, and backend solutions — sharing what I learn along the way.

home.title: Software Developer | Kuray Karaaslan
home.description: Welcome to my tech blog! I'm Kuray Karaaslan, a frontend, backend, and mobile developer skilled in React, Next.js, Node.js, Java, and React Native. I share practical coding tutorials, industry insights, and UI/UX tips to help developers and tech enthusiasts excel. Stay updated, solve problems, and grow your tech expertise with me!

blog.title: Blog | Kuray Karaaslan
blog.description: Welcome to my tech blog! I'm Kuray Karaaslan, a frontend, backend, and mobile developer skilled in React, Next.js, Node.js, Java, and React Native. I share practical coding tutorials, industry insights, and UI/UX tips to help developers and tech enthusiasts excel.

projects.title: Projects | Kuray Karaaslan
projects.description: Explore my portfolio of web, mobile, desktop, and other software projects. Built with React, Next.js, Node.js, Java, React Native, and more.

now.title: Now | Kuray Karaaslan
now.description: What Kuray Karaaslan is focused on right now — work, side projects, learning, and life.

hero.description: <bold>Product-focused Full-Stack Developer</bold> with <bold>3+ years of experience</bold> delivering robust, scalable software solutions across <bold>frontend, backend, mobile in BIM and IoT domains.</bold> Specialized in <bold>Java Spring Boot, React, Next.js, Node.js, and PostgreSQL</bold>. Adept at architecting <bold>multi-tenant SaaS platforms, real-time systems, and payment integrations.</bold> Combines strong engineering fundamentals with <bold>creative problem-solving</bold> and a <bold>clean, systematic coding approach.</bold>

platforms.subtitle: Active on different platforms
platforms.title: I'm available on the following platforms. You can hire me on any of these platforms.

hire_me.heading: Seamless Freelance Experience
hire_me.description: Have a project in mind? Let's work together to make it a reality.

services.title: My Services
services.description: I offer a wide range of services to help you build your dream project.
services.mobile_description: I develop mobile applications for both Android and iOS platforms. I use the latest technologies and tools to deliver high-quality applications.
services.web_description: I can help you build a website or web app using React, Next.js that looks great on all devices.
services.backend_description: Have a project that requires a backend? I can help you build a scalable and secure backend using Node.js, Express, and Postgresql.
services.other_description: I can help you with your custom software development needs. Contact us to discuss your project, like setting up a CI/CD pipeline, writing tests, or deploying your app.

testimonials.title: What People Say
testimonials.description: I've worked with some amazing people and companies. Here's what they have to say about me.

git_contributions.title: An unstoppable developer
git_contributions.description: After switching to the software industry, I continued to develop without a break.
git_contributions.aria_label: View my GitHub profile (opens in new tab)

toolbox.title: Creativity needs a lot of tools
toolbox.description: Have a lot of tools in my toolbox, and i'm always learning new ones.

timeline.title: My Journey
timeline.description: My transition from a Structural Engineer to a Software Developer has been a journey of learning, growth, and transformation. Here's a snapshot of my professional journey so far.

items.roltek_desc:
• Communication between IoT Devices and Servers using the MQTT, Websocket, SNMP, and REST.
• Developing serverside application with Java Spring, deploying and maintenance.
• Developing clientside application with Typescript React, deploying and maintenance.
• Network management and monitoring.
items.kuray_yapi_desc:
• Developing turnkey construction projects.
• Building Information Modeling (BIM) projects.
• Architectural, Structural floor plans and details.
• Interior architectural projects and applying them to the project.
• Construction management and planning of the project.
items.cadbim_desc:
• Building Information Modeling (BIM) consultancy services.
• Autodesk AutoCAD, Revit, Robot Structural Analysis Professional, Advance Steel.
• Application development with Autodesk API using C#, PHP Rest API.
